vars.style: Premium editorial sports photography. High-contrast cinematic color grade with directional rim light. Tight composition. Deep shadows, warm highlights. Subtle film grain. No text overlays, no logos, no scores, no graphic elements. Photographic realism, magazine-cover quality.

jobs.name: hero.jpg
jobs.prompt: Editorial basketball scene — a referee blowing the whistle mid-action, players in motion in the background out of focus. High-contrast lighting, court reflections. No team identification. {style}
